key_findings.description: local_transport above standard per day for city tier

key_findings.detail: R004223: 3700 exceeds threshold 3500 (participants NULL, treated as 1)

key_findings.description: training daily rate internal >800 or external >1200
key_findings.detail: No training_fee records have days > 0; cannot compute daily rate

key_findings.detail: No training_lodging records; training_fee records lack nights/city_tier

Multiple employee-months exceed 300 cap; all non-exempt records in those months flagged

key_findings.description: duplicate invoices: same invoice_no in >=2 records
key_findings.detail: 6 invoice pairs reused: FP202500000002,005,020,028,037,055 each used twice

key_findings.description: split claims: same employee+type within 7 days, >=2 records, total >=10000
key_findings.detail: 6 split claim groups (2 or 3 records each) by employees E0007/E0008/E0009/E0010 for travel_lodging, each group total >=10000

key_findings.description: late submission: >60 days (or >75 if expense after Nov 1)
key_findings.detail: 6 injected records with delays of 65-120 days, all from R004227-R004232

key_findings.description: department cumulative approved exceeds annual budget
key_findings.detail: 6 departments exceeded budgets (D001-D006); all post-crossing records flagged. D007-D010 within budget.

all_violation_record_ids: See work/subagents/data_analyst/summary.json for complete list of 1643 unique IDs

data_quality_notes.special_approval: 0 records with special_approval=true; exemption rules not triggered
data_quality_notes.training_fee_fields: All 578 training_fee records have participants=NULL, days=NULL, nights=NULL, city_tier=NULL. Per-person and per-day checks default to divisor=1. Only R04 (daily) returns 0 because no days field is set.
data_quality_notes.city_tier: Values are A/B/C (mapped to 一类/二类/三类). 2587 records have NULL city_tier (office_supplies, communication, some training_fee). Travel_lodging (883) and local_transport (770) all have city_tier set.
data_quality_notes.population_coverage: Full 2025 population scanned; no records excluded from scope
